title: Your Blog Post Title Here
lead: Hook the reader in 2–3 sentences. Acknowledge why the topic feels hard. Preview what they'll learn (playbook + fun facts). Tease how GuruForU teachers help.

sections.title: Why [Topic] Feels Hard in Class X
content: Empathetic opening: name the real difficulty (not 'it's hard' but WHY—e.g., too many formulas at once, abstract concepts, exam traps).
Second paragraph: the hidden skill gap most students miss.

highlights.title: Common Struggle 1
highlights.text: Specific mistake or confusion students face.

sections.title: Fun Facts: [Topic] in the Real World
content: One sentence framing why these facts make the topic interesting.

highlights.title: Surprising Fact 1
highlights.text: History, nature, technology, or daily-life connection. Keep under 2 sentences.

highlights.title: Surprising Fact 2
highlights.text: Another engaging fact that makes readers want to keep reading.

highlights.title: Surprising Fact 3
highlights.text: Connect to something students recognize (sports, phones, space, food, etc.).

highlights.title: Surprising Fact 4
highlights.text: A 'wow' fact that shows why this topic matters beyond exams.

sections.title: [Topic] Essentials: What You Must Know
content: Core concept 1 with plain-language explanation and key formula if relevant.

sections.title: How to Tackle [Topic]: A Student's Playbook
content: One sentence: the mindset or framework before the steps.

list.item: Step 1—Label: Specific actionable step students can follow.
Step 2—Label: Next step in the playbook.
Step 4—Label: Include exam tips or sanity checks.
Step 6—Label: Connect to next chapter or real application.

sections.title: How GuruForU Teachers Tackle This Complex Topic
content: One sentence: GuruForU doesn't just explain formulas—we rebuild how students think about the topic.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 1
strategies.text: e.g., Real-world demos, visual simulations, or interactive models.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 2
strategies.text: e.g., Chunked skill progression—master one layer before adding the next.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 3
strategies.text: e.g., AI-powered gap detection and targeted practice drills.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 4
strategies.text: e.g., Live one-on-one problem solving with instant feedback.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 5
strategies.text: e.g., Exam pattern recognition for boards/JEE.

strategies.title: Specific Teaching Move 6
strategies.text: e.g., Bridge to upcoming chapters so students see the bigger picture.

cta.title: Topic-Specific CTA Title
cta.text: 2–3 sentences. Tie the topic to GuruForU's approach (personalized tutoring, AI tracking, expert teachers). Warm and helpful—not pushy.

faq.question: How do GuruForU teachers help with [topic]?
faq.answer: Summarize 2–3 specific teaching strategies from the GuruForU section above.
